svg.title: Front Bezel — Engineering Drawing
svg.text: Material: PETG | All dimensions in mm | Bezel frame: X=width(0..160), Z=height(0..72), Y=depth(0=outer, +toward interior)
SECTION A-A (cut at Z=36, looking along -Z)
SECTION C-C (cut at Z=10, looking along -Z)

g.text: 2. Print: outer face (Y=0) on build plate
3. 6 integral snap tabs (BL1, BL2, BR1, BR2, BF1, BT1)
4. 2mm external fillets on all outer edges
6. 1mm internal fillets at return wall junctions
7. 1.5mm ellipsoidal palm crown on outer face
8. Step-lap rabbet: 1.5mm walls fill Sub-I pockets
9. Tab cantilever: 10mm eff. length, 1mm beam, 1.5mm barb
10. 0.2mm clearance per side on rabbet mating faces
